description.DE: DE: Check that p is prime
description.FR: FR: Contrôler que p est un nombre premier

description.DE: DE: Check that q is prime
description.FR: FR: Contrôler que q est un nombre premier

description.DE: DE: Check that p is 2q + 1
description.FR: FR: Contrôler que p = 2q + 1

description.DE: DE: Check that bitlength(p) >= 2048
description.FR: FR: Contrôler que bitlength(p) >= 2048

description.DE: DE: Check that the voting options [vo] are prime
description.FR: FR: Contrôler que les options de vote [vo] sont premier

description.DE: DE: Check that the voting options are quadratic residues of the group
description.FR: FR: Check that the voting options are quadratic residues of the group

description.DE: DE: Check that components of the public key of the electoral authorities are part of the group q
description.FR: FR: Check that components of the public key of the electoral authorities are part of the group q

description.DE: DE: Check that the number of primer numbers corresponds to the number of voting options and there are no prime numbers repeated
description.FR: FR: Check that the number of primer numbers corresponds to the number of voting options and there are no prime numbers repeated

description.DE: DE: Check that the number of credentials corresponds to the number of voters in the electoral roll
description.FR: FR: Check that the number of credentials corresponds to the number of voters in the electoral roll

description.DE: DE: Verify the signature of the eCH-0045 file
description.FR: FR: Verify the signature of the eCH-0045 file

description.DE: DE: Verify the signature of the eCH-0157 or eCH-0159
description.FR: FR: Verify the signature of the eCH-0157 or eCH-0159

description.DE: DE: Verify the signature of the configuration-anonymized.xml
description.FR: FR: Verify the signature of the configuration-anonymized.xml

description.DE: DE: Verify the signature of the dataConfig.json
description.FR: FR: Verify the signature of the dataConfig.json

description.DE: DE: Verify that the prime numbers were mapped to the correct answers / candidates / lists in evoting-decrypt.xml
description.FR: FR: Verify that the prime numbers were mapped to the correct answers / candidates / lists in evoting-decrypt.xml

description.DE: DE: Verify that the number of yes / no / blank votes in the eCH-0110 matches the information in evoting-decrypt.xml
description.FR: FR: Verify that the number of yes / no / blank votes in the eCH-0110 matches the information in evoting-decrypt.xml

description.DE: DE: Verify that the number of candidate votes in the eCH-0110 corresponds to the information in the evoting-decrypt.xml (applies to both proportional and majority elections)
description.FR: FR: Verify that the number of candidate votes in the eCH-0110 corresponds to the information in the evoting-decrypt.xml (applies to both proportional and majority elections)

description.DE: DE: Verify that the number of votes for a list in the eCH-0110 corresponds the information in the eCH-0110 (applies only to proportional elections)
description.FR: FR: Verify that the number of votes for a list in the eCH-0110 corresponds the information in the eCH-0110 (applies only to proportional elections)

description.DE: DE: Check signature of decompressedVotes.csv
description.FR: FR: Check signature of decompressedVotes.csv

description.DE: DE: Check signature of evoting-decrypt.xml
description.FR: FR: Check signature of evoting-decrypt.xml

description.DE: DE: Check signature of eCH-0110.xml
description.FR: FR: Check signature of eCH-0110.xml
